title: DVD menus
wikitext:
[]: DVD menus             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Feb 04, 2008 10:25 am Was wondering how the DVD menus change between regions, as I saw a video on YouTube of the DVD menu for End of Evangelion ( http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5vPtAxmMWiU ) and it looked completely different (and far cooler) than the one on my disk - I don't have any of the pre-platinum DVDs so I'd be interested to know what their menus are like, as well as the menus from the Japanese Renewal release.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Feb 04, 2008 11:20 am That youtube video is the R1 DVD menu. The one for Death and Rebirth was also really cool. It's a shame that the best part about those releases was the menus. I have the Renewal DVD's, but the menus aren't anything special.

[]:             Quote Post by shito » Mon Feb 04, 2008 5:42 pm Here's the menu for the R2 DVD of Volume 7 that came in the Second Impact Box very bland, eh? But it came with some cool sketch drawings and the entire scripts for the final TV episodes and eps 25' and 26'.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 04, 2008 5:46 pm With careful attention paid to Rei's nipple, I see.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Feb 04, 2008 6:37 pm Translated version:

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Feb 04, 2008 7:32 pm holy crap, ^THAT^ is funneh d'you get it from THAT BOARD or somewhere else?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Feb 04, 2008 7:50 pm NAvery, we need to get you a girlfriend.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Feb 04, 2008 8:09 pm BrikHaus wrote: NAvery, we need to get you a girlfriend.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Feb 04, 2008 8:17 pm That's one weird subgun.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Feb 04, 2008 8:36 pm UrsusArctos wrote: That's one weird subgun.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Feb 04, 2008 8:43 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: holy crap, ^THAT^ is funneh d'you get it from THAT BOARD or somewhere else?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Feb 05, 2008 10:00 am shito wrote: very bland, eh?

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Feb 05, 2008 11:15 am platinum is, but i don't have my discs right now. SOWWY!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 05, 2008 1:49 pm Platinum looks exactly the same in terms of the menu (does the BGM Tokyo-3 play when you start it up?), I can't comment on Death & Rebirth, though. (Zugz, your current Rei/Misato avatar is giving me an instantaneous nosebleed.)

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Tue Feb 05, 2008 2:34 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Zugz, your current Rei/Misato avatar is giving me an instantaneous nosebleed.)[/size]

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Feb 05, 2008 8:02 pm That looks like the standalone Platinum, 'cause the one I have has an image of Shinji instead of water. And like SSD and Indigo said...Zugz, that avatar of yours!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 05, 2008 8:30 pm I do have standalone Platninum (single volumes) so that would explain it. ^^; By the way, does your version of Platinum have an image of the volume cover when you press stop on the DVD player? (Never know what those DVD image things are called.) @Ursus: Screencap if you don't mind?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Feb 05, 2008 9:05 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Wed Feb 06, 2008 2:21 am I'm gessing that's the version in the large-tin-box-set.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Wed Feb 06, 2008 6:42 pm Nah, I have that recent tin box set, and there's nothing in the top corner except the water like the other platinum releases. (Unless there's ANOTHER platinum tin release, of course)
